relock_reason: The v1.2 evidence cycle ended in an integrity NO-GO and its untouched cohort is spent. A fresh v1.3 untouched cohort was selected before candidate execution from two isolated metadata-only searches by a deterministic, content-bound process that excluded all prior golden, untouched, reserve, conflict-exclusion, and development identities.
eligibility: full immutable Git commit can be resolved
contains an observable LLM application, agent, RAG, evaluation, gateway, or orchestration surface
primary implementation is TypeScript/JavaScript or Python, or exposes those integrations
not a fork or near-duplicate of another selected repository
inspection is permitted by published repository terms
can be scanned within 4 GiB checkout size and 30 minute wall-clock ceiling
exclusion: documentation-only repository with no runnable integration surface
model weights or dataset repository without application code
archived repository with no uniquely needed coverage stratum
repository chosen or replaced because of observed detector performance
assignment: Repositories were assigned before detector execution to produce two disjoint, heterogeneous cohorts. Assignment is not random and results must not be generalized to all LLM applications.
replacement_rule: Use the first eligible reserve candidate with the same primary surface stratum; record the failed eligibility clause and never consult detector output.
reserve_extension_rule: If every preregistered reserve for a required surface is consumed or ineligible, append and record the first metadata-eligible same-surface reserve, then re-lock and independently review the complete policy and cohorts before any detector execution.
blinding_incident_rule: If untouched source opportunities or labels reach a rule author before the detector artifact is formally frozen, retire the entire affected cohort from release measurement. Preserve its immutable artifacts, disclose the incident, select a completely disjoint replacement from two independent metadata-only searches, bind the exact exclusion set and deterministic selector, and independently review and re-freeze both current manifests before any detector execution.
replacement_selection_rule: For llm-selection-v1.3, seed Anthropic, OpenAI, and local/open-model provider coverage, then fill exact surface quotas gateway=1, chat_app=3, local_model=3, rag=4, agent_tools=6, evaluation_or_framework=7. Rank exact dual-proposal agreement before single-proposal candidates, then by SHA-256 of policy_id|surface|lowercase_repository. Exclude classification conflicts rather than resolving them after selection.
